since_last: 70% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +0.83%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +1.98% · Gold +0.33% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 70% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.83%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.83%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +5.22%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.22%, PLTR +4.51%, ADBE +2.14%, ADBE +2.14%, SMCI +1.77%. Laggards: BIDU -4.04%, DELL -1.49%, BABA -1.49%, ANET -1.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.98% at $159.08
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
